[Company Letterhead]

Date: 15 October 2023

To: Dr. Jane Lim  
NRIC: S1234567A  
Email: jane.lim@fictionalcorp.sg  
Phone: +65 6123 4567

Dear Dr. Lim,

We are pleased to extend an offer of employment to you with Fictional Corporation Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12FC3456K) for the position of Senior Data Analyst. Your starting annual salary will be SGD 85,000. The commencement date is expected to be 1 November 2023, pending completion of all necessary documentation.

Please note that this offer does not constitute a project plan or guarantee of project status, and your employment is contingent upon successful background verification. The employment agreement (the "Agreement") is attached for your review.

To accept this offer, please sign and return the Agreement by 22 October 2023. If you have any questions, feel free to contact our HR department at hr@fictionalcorp.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to the team.

Sincerely,

Mr. John Tan  
Human Resources Manager  
Fictional Corporation Pte. Ltd.  
Phone: +65 6876 5432

[End of Document]
